_meta.citation: 08-RESEARCH §4.5: ROADMAP SC-3 over a 30-year horizon -> 5/1 ARM term_months=360 yields exactly 25 reset triggers ([61, 73, ..., 349]). _synthesize_index_path covers all triggers; build_arm_schedule emits one ResetEvent per trigger; therefore reset_count==25 for every path on a 5/1 ARM 30yr base.

notes: 30-year horizon invariant pin: 5/1 ARM with initial=60, reset=12, term=360 produces lib.arm.compute_reset_triggers => [61, 73, 85, 97, ..., 349] = 25 triggers. _synthesize_index_path generates 25 IndexPathEntry rows; ARMRequest.index_path alignment-validator (lib/arm.py:107-145) confirms each trigger has a matching path entry; build_arm_schedule emits 25 ResetEvent rows. Per D-05-01 engine-emitted values.
